# GKOctreeNode

**Class**

A helper class for managing the objects you organize in an octree.

## Declaration

```swift
class GKOctreeNode
```

## Overview

You don’t create instances of this class directly; instead, a [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKOctree] object provides you with a [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKOctreeNode] instance when you add an element to a tree. If you plan to remove elements from the tree, keep references to the corresponding nodes so you can use the [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKOctree/remove(_:using:)] method for better performance.

## Examining a Node

- **box**: The axis-aligned bounding box represented by the node.

## Spatial Partitioning

- **GKQuadtree**: A data structure for organizing objects based on their locations in a two-dimensional space.
- **GKQuadtreeNode**: A helper class for managing the objects you organize in a quadtree.
- **GKOctree**: A data structure for organizing objects based on their locations in a three-dimensional space.
- **GKRTree**: A data structure that adaptively organizes objects based on their locations in a two-dimensional space.

## Inherits From

- NSObject

## Conforms To

- CVarArg
- CustomDebugStringConvertible
- CustomStringConvertible
- Equatable
- Hashable
- NSObjectProtocol
